description: A citizen reports that an EV charging station is not working. An operator needs to verify the status and dispatch a technician.

nodes.task_description: Identify the EV charging station by its ID or location from the citizen report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct charging station in the system.

nodes.task_description: Run a remote diagnostic on the charging station.

expected_outcome.value: The diagnostic tool returns a 'No Communication' error, confirming it is offline.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a maintenance technician to repair the station and update its status to 'Out of Service' on public maps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the work order and updates the public status.
